notices.title: Demo Sandbox Data Handling Notice
notices.body: DemoSandbox mode is for synthetic demonstration and test data only. Do not upload real customer CUI, classified information, export-controlled technical data, payroll data, secrets, or production contract evidence.

notices.title: No-CUI Data Handling Notice
notices.body: NoCui mode is compliance management only. Real customer CUI upload is prohibited, along with classified information, export-controlled technical data, payroll data, secrets, private keys, and other prohibited sensitive content.

notices.title: CUI-Ready Data Handling Notice
notices.body: CuiReady mode permits CUI handling only in approved tenant workflows after CUI-ready approval. Customers remain responsible for classification decisions, shared responsibility matrix obligations, contract-specific handling rules, and downstream export or deletion decisions.
